action_set_definitions.name: get_contract_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of the NDA environment, including all clauses, the compliance checklist, and document metadata. Essential for identifying IDs and current text before modification.

action_set_definitions.name: patch_clause
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the content of a specific clause. Use this to modify existing text without deleting the entire section.

clause_id.description: The unique identifier of the clause to be updated.

updated_content.description: The new text for the clause, including the required modifications for unaided memory and IP safeguards.

action_set_definitions.name: update_compliance_item
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a specific item in the compliance checklist.

item_key.description: The key of the checklist item (e.g., 'ip_protection_verified').

action_set_definitions.name: set_document_workflow_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the overall workflow status of the document to a new state.

state_description.contract_metadata: General information about the NDA document.
state_description.clauses: A list of objects representing each section of the NDA.
state_description.compliance_checklist: A mapping of required legal elements to their current fulfillment status (boolean).

clauses.title: Confidential Information
clauses.content: Proprietary information includes all technical data and latency optimization algorithms.

clauses.title: Usage of General Knowledge
clauses.content: The Receiving Party shall be free to use for any purpose any information or ideas resulting from access to the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information and work product.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.content: This agreement terminates five years after the effective date.
